title: Poland is now among the 20 largest economies
author: surprisetalk
aiHeadline: Poland's economy has officially joined the big leagues, proving that even countries with questionable policies can make it to the top 20.

title: Google broke reCAPTCHA for de-googled Android users
author: anonymousiam
aiHeadline: Google's latest move: breaking reCAPTCHA for users who dared to remove Google services, because nothing says 'user-friendly' like forcing people to reinstall their stuff.

title: Google Cloud Fraud Defence is just WEI repackaged
author: ribtoks
aiHeadline: Google Cloud Fraud Defence: because who needs new technology when you can just rename last year's product and call it innovative?

title: A web page that shows you everything the browser told it without asking
author: mwheelz
aiHeadline: A website that tracks you better than your own browser, because privacy is so 2010.

title: David Attenborough's 100th Birthday
author: defrost
aiHeadline: David Attenborough turns 100, proving that the only way to live forever is by narrating documentaries about nature.
